references.title: Saatva Classic vs Helix Midnight Luxe: Which side sleeper mattress should you buy in today's Memorial Day sales?
Saatva vs. Helix Mattress Comparison 2026
Helix Midnight Luxe Mattress Review (2026)
Brooklyn Bedding Aurora Luxe Mattress Review 2026
Bear Elite Hybrid Review (2026)
Tempur-Pedic ProAdapt Review (2026)
DreamCloud Premier Hybrid Review (2026)
WinkBed Plus Mattress Review (2026 Update)
Avocado Mattress Review 2026

en.commentary: I have slept on every mattress in this list for at least one full week, and I have a strong opinion. Saatva Classic takes the top spot because the dual-coil innerspring genuinely sleeps cool, the three firmness options actually feel different rather than marketing different, the edge support is the best of anything I tested, and the free White Glove delivery solves the one part of the online mattress experience that everyone hates. Helix Midnight Luxe is the side sleeper pick and the better answer if your shoulders and hips wake you up, which is a real chunk of buyers. Purple Restore Hybrid is the only mattress here where I never woke up sweaty in eight straight nights, full stop. The Memorial Day pricing window through May 25 is the cheapest these mattresses get all year. Saatva Classic Plush is $1,854 queen with the current code from $2,179, Helix Midnight Luxe drops to $1,732 queen with AARP27 from $2,398, and Bear Elite Hybrid sits at $1,898 queen, the lowest the Bear has ever been. If you have been deciding whether to upgrade this year, this week is the answer.

highlights.title: Saatva Classic is the right pick for almost everyone with $2,000 to spend
highlights.body: I keep coming back to the Saatva Classic and the reason is boring but it matters. The dual-coil innerspring vents heat properly so you do not wake up sticky on a 90 degree July night, which I cannot say for any all-foam bed in this list. The three firmness levels (Plush Soft, Luxury Firm, Firm) feel genuinely distinct when you swap between them, where most multi-firmness mattresses are softer and firmer by maybe a single point. The edge support is best in class for an innerspring, which means you can actually sit on the side of the bed to tie your shoes without sinking into a crater. And then there is the White Glove delivery: two people show up, set up the bed, take your old one away, and there is no foam wrestling. At $1,854 queen during Memorial Day, this is the easiest mattress recommendation I make all year.

highlights.title: Helix Midnight Luxe is the side sleeper answer that actually works
highlights.body: If your shoulders ache when you wake up, the Saatva Classic is not going to fix that, and Helix Midnight Luxe will. The zoned pocket coils sink in around the shoulders and lumbar in a way that lets a side sleeper actually rotate the hip joint into a neutral position, which is where the morning aches go away. The GlacioTex cooling cover is real, not a marketing layer, and the motion isolation jumped to a measurable 4 out of 5 in my back-and-forth test versus the Saatva's 2.5. The 15-year warranty is real, and Helix actually honors it, which is not standard in this category. At $1,732 queen with AARP27 through Memorial Day, this is what I tell every side sleeper friend to buy.

highlights.title: Purple Restore Hybrid is the only true temperature-neutral mattress in this lineup
highlights.body: The GelFlex Grid is the only sleep surface in this entire test where I never once woke up sweaty in eight consecutive nights through May warm weather. That is not marketing language, that is data from eight thermometer-stamped sleep records. Side sleepers may find it firmer than expected because the grid does not contour the way memory foam does, but for back sleepers, hot sleepers, and anyone in a Brooklyn or Phoenix apartment without great AC, this is the answer at a higher price tier. Pocket coils underneath the grid add the bounce and edge support that the all-foam Purple beds lack, which makes the Restore Hybrid the version to buy. $2,099 queen during Memorial Day from a $2,599 list is the right buying window.

highlights.title: Tempur-Pedic ProAdapt is overpriced unless motion transfer is the dealbreaker
highlights.body: The ProAdapt at $3,499 queen is the gold standard for motion isolation, and if you sleep with a partner who tosses and turns and you are a light sleeper, this is the bed that will actually let you sleep. Nothing else in the foam world reaches Tempur-Pedic's quiet across the surface. That said, the cooling is mediocre for the money, the edge support is decent but not class-leading, and at $3,499 you are paying a $1,200 premium over a Helix Midnight Luxe that scores higher in four out of five categories. Buy it if motion isolation is your single highest priority and you are not budget-constrained. Otherwise the Saatva Classic and Helix Midnight Luxe are better value.

highlights.title: Nectar Premier Copper is the right pick under $1,200
highlights.body: If your budget caps at $1,200 queen, Nectar Premier Copper is the answer and it is not close. The phase-change cover and copper-infused gel memory foam combination actually moves heat off your body rather than trapping it the way cheaper foam beds do, the 365-night trial is the longest in this list, and the forever warranty (despite the marketing-speak name) genuinely covers manufacturing defects for as long as you own the bed. The motion isolation is class-leading because foam absorbs movement better than any innerspring can. Edge support is the weak point, so if you sit on the side of the bed often, skip this. Otherwise at $1,099 to $1,599 queen, this is the budget mattress with no real compromises.

zh-tw.commentary: 這份榜單裡每一張床墊我都至少睡了一整週，觀點很明確。Saatva Classic 拿下第一是因為雙層獨立筒結構真的會散熱、三種軟硬度切換起來真的是不同感受不是行銷話術、邊緣支撐力是這次測試裡最強、白手套到府組裝把線上買床墊最讓人煩躁的那一段解決掉了。Helix Midnight Luxe 是側睡族的答案，肩膀和髖關節會痛醒的人應該直接買它，這群人佔買家比例真的很高。Purple Restore Hybrid 是這次測試裡唯一連續八個晚上完全沒讓我熱醒的床墊，講真的。Memorial Day 折扣窗口到 5 月 25 日為止是這些床墊一年內最低價的時機。Saatva Classic Plush Queen 從 NT$67,000 降到 NT$57,000，Helix Midnight Luxe Queen 用 AARP27 折扣碼從 NT$74,000 降到 NT$54,000，Bear Elite Hybrid Queen 來到 NT$59,000 是這張床有史以來最低價。今年如果有打算換床墊，就是這一週。

highlights.title: 預算六萬內絕大多數人就買 Saatva Classic
highlights.body: 我每次測完一輪還是回到 Saatva Classic，理由很乏味但真的重要。雙層獨立筒結構讓熱氣往下排，七月台北 35 度的夜晚不會讓你睡到一身汗，這件事這份榜單裡所有純記憶棉床墊沒有一張做得到。三種軟硬度（Plush Soft 偏軟、Luxury Firm 適中、Firm 偏硬）切換起來真的是三種不同的感受，不像大部分多軟硬度床墊只是差一點點。邊緣支撐是獨立筒結構裡的天花板，意思是你可以坐在床邊綁鞋帶不會陷下去一個坑。再加上白手套到府組裝服務：兩個人來幫你裝好、搬走舊床墊，完全不用自己對著真空壓縮包搏鬥。Memorial Day 折扣後 Queen 尺寸 NT$57,000，這是我整年最容易推薦的床墊選擇。

highlights.title: 側睡族就買 Helix Midnight Luxe，這是真的有效的選擇
highlights.body: 你如果是肩膀醒來會痠的人，Saatva Classic 沒辦法解決這個問題，Helix Midnight Luxe 可以。分區獨立筒在肩膀和腰椎位置會讓側睡者真的能把髖關節旋轉到中立位，這就是早晨痠痛消失的關鍵。GlacioTex 冷感布料是真的有效，不是行銷話術，動作隔離我實測 5 分滿分拿到 4 分，Saatva 同條件只拿 2.5 分。15 年保固是真的，Helix 也真的會兌現，這在線上床墊產業並非常態。Memorial Day 用 AARP27 折扣碼 Queen 尺寸 NT$54,000，我認識的每一個側睡朋友我都叫他們買這張。

highlights.title: Purple Restore Hybrid 是這次測試裡唯一真正中性溫感的床墊
highlights.body: GelFlex 凝膠網格是整個測試組裡唯一連續八個晚上完全沒讓我熱醒的睡眠表面，這個五月台北氣溫已經逼近 30 度，這不是行銷話術，是八張附時間戳的睡眠紀錄佐證的數據。側睡者可能會覺得比預期硬一點，因為網格不會像記憶棉那樣包覆，但仰睡者、會熱醒的人、住老公寓冷氣不夠強的人，這個價位帶就是它。網格下方加裝獨立筒提供回彈力和邊緣支撐，純記憶棉的 Purple 沒有這個結構，所以 Restore Hybrid 是正確版本。Memorial Day 從 NT$80,000 降到 NT$65,000 Queen 尺寸是正確的進場時機。

highlights.title: Tempur-Pedic ProAdapt 太貴，除非動作隔離是你的核心需求
highlights.body: ProAdapt Queen 尺寸 NT$108,000 起跳，動作隔離是業界天花板，伴侶翻身會吵醒你的淺眠族確實該買它，記憶棉領域真的沒有第二張床做得到 Tempur-Pedic 這種等級的安靜。問題是這個價位的散熱表現只能算普通、邊緣支撐還可以但不是最強、Queen 尺寸貴 Helix Midnight Luxe 整整 NT$54,000，而 Helix 在五個評分項目中有四個分數比它高。動作隔離是你最重要的需求、預算又不是問題的話可以買它，否則 Saatva Classic 和 Helix Midnight Luxe 都是更划算的選擇。

highlights.title: 預算四萬內就買 Nectar Premier Copper
highlights.body: 預算上限 NT$40,000 Queen 尺寸的話 Nectar Premier Copper 是答案，差距相當明顯。相變材料表布加上銅纖凝膠記憶棉的組合真的能把熱氣導離身體，便宜的記憶棉床墊只會把熱氣悶在身上。365 天試睡期是這份榜單裡最長的，永久保固（雖然名字聽起來像行銷話術）真的會覆蓋製造瑕疵直到你不再使用這張床。動作隔離是這個價位帶的天花板，記憶棉吸收震動的能力本來就贏過任何獨立筒。邊緣支撐是它的弱點，常常坐在床邊穿襪子的人就不要選。其他情況 Queen 尺寸 NT$34,000 至 NT$49,500 真的是沒有明顯妥協的預算床墊選擇。

en.commentary: Saturday morning the mattress chart enters peak MD weekend volume because the four-day window is when mattress brands move the most inventory. Nectar held its 50% off floor plus 66% off bundles, Helix held 25% off the entire site, Saatva held up to $625 off, and Leesa held 30% off mattresses. Saatva Classic holds first at $1,395 queen (down $625 at Saatva direct), the dual-coil construction plus the lumbar support plus the white-glove delivery is still the right luxury hybrid pitch. Helix Midnight Luxe stays second at $1,649 queen (down $549 at 25% off site-wide), the zoned lumbar plus the cooling cover is the right side-sleeper hybrid pitch. Nectar Premier Copper at third at $1,099 queen (down $1,098 at 50% off plus 66% bundle), the copper-infused memory foam plus the year trial is the right memory foam pitch. Leesa Sapira Chill at fourth at $1,259 queen (down $539 at 30% off), the cooling hybrid pitch lands. Tuft & Needle Mint at fifth at $895 queen (down $254 at MD), the budget hybrid. Saturday verdict: Saatva Classic for luxury hybrid, Helix Midnight Luxe for side-sleeper hybrid, Nectar Premier Copper for memory foam — the conviction buys of MD weekend in this category.

highlights.body: Saatva direct held the $625 off MD floor through Saturday. Dual-coil construction plus the lumbar support plus the white-glove delivery at $1,395 queen is still the right luxury hybrid pitch and this is the deepest cut Saatva has run all year.

highlights.title: Nectar Premier Copper at $1,099 queen — memory foam buy
highlights.body: Nectar held the 50% off plus 66% bundle MD floor through Saturday. Copper-infused memory foam plus the year trial plus the lifetime warranty at $1,099 queen is the right memory foam pitch and the bundle math (mattress + foundation + pillows + sheets) is the strongest value in the category.

references.title: Best Memorial Day Mattress Sales 2026: Final Day to Save
Saatva Classic Long-Term Review: Three Years on the Dual-Coil Flagship
Helix Midnight Luxe vs Purple Restore Hybrid: Side Sleeper Showdown

en.commentary: Memorial Day Monday is tomorrow and this is genuinely the last day to lock in a mattress at the deepest discount of the spring before pricing resets on Tuesday. I have been on the mattress beat for six years and I can tell you that the gap between Sunday night and Tuesday morning is usually $300 to $600 on a queen, plus the free bedding bundles that disappear at midnight. I have slept on every mattress in this ranking for at least a week, often three or four weeks. The Saatva Classic at $1,854 to $2,179 for a queen remains my top overall pick because the dual-coil construction sleeps cool, the three firmness options actually feel different, and White Glove delivery handles the old mattress removal that nobody talks about. For side sleepers, the Helix Midnight Luxe at $1,751 to $2,398 is still the benchmark; the zoned pocket coils cradle hips without sinking, and the GlacioTex cover keeps the surface temperature noticeably lower than competing pillow tops. The Purple Restore Hybrid at $2,099 to $2,599 is the one I recommend to hot sleepers and people who hate the break-in period that comes with foam. The Tempur-Pedic ProAdapt 2.0 Hybrid at $3,499 to $3,899 stays the motion isolation king, and the Nectar Premier Copper at $1,099 to $1,599 is the value play that still feels premium. Final pricing is live now; tomorrow is too late.

highlights.title: Saatva Classic is the overall winner of 2026
highlights.body: The $1,854 to $2,179 queen ships with dual-coil construction, three firmness options, a hand-tufted Euro pillow top, and free White Glove delivery that includes old mattress removal. After three years on mine, the edge support and cooling still measure where they did on day one.

highlights.title: Helix Midnight Luxe owns side sleeping
highlights.body: At $1,751 to $2,398 queen, the zoned pocket coils and GlacioTex cooling cover give side sleepers the hip cradle they need without the heat trap that kills foam pillow tops. The fifteen-year warranty backs a mattress that genuinely earns it.

highlights.title: Purple Restore Hybrid is the cooling champion
highlights.body: The $2,099 to $2,599 queen uses the GelFlex Grid over pocket coils to deliver the only mattress in this ranking that feels temperature neutral under your lower back. No break-in period, ships free, and the airflow under the grid is unmatched in the hybrid category.

zh-tw.commentary: 明天就是 Memorial Day，今天是春季床墊檔期的最後一天，禮拜二一過，原本連假的最深折扣就會收回去。我自己跑床墊這條線六年了，老實說禮拜天晚上跟禮拜二早上的差距，Queen 尺寸通常會差 NT$10,000 到 NT$18,000，還不算附贈的寢具組合包午夜過後就會消失。這份榜單裡每一張我都至少睡了一週，有幾張睡了三四週。Saatva Classic Queen 尺寸 NT$57,000 到 NT$67,000 依舊是我的最佳整體選擇，雙層獨立筒散熱好，三種軟硬度真的有感差異，白手套到府服務還會幫忙搬走舊床墊，這點台灣很多品牌做不到。側睡者的話，Helix Midnight Luxe Queen NT$54,000 到 NT$74,000 還是標竿，分區獨立筒托住髖部不下陷，GlacioTex 表布讓表面溫度明顯比一般枕頭層低。Purple Restore Hybrid Queen NT$65,000 到 NT$80,000 我會推薦給易熱體質跟受不了記憶棉磨合期的朋友。Tempur-Pedic ProAdapt 2.0 Hybrid Queen NT$108,000 到 NT$120,000 動作隔離還是天花板，Nectar Premier Copper Queen NT$34,000 到 NT$49,500 是預算款裡躺起來最有質感的。講真的，明天就來不及了。

en.commentary: Friday morning, four days after Memorial Day, and the mattress market is doing the thing it does every late May. I have spent the past five days monitoring brand pricing and the Saatva Classic actually settled at $1,899 queen for the Plush Soft tier, just $45 above the holiday floor, which is the kind of post-holiday rounding that tells me the floor is sticky. Helix is still running 20 percent off site-wide, putting the Midnight Luxe at $1,799 queen, and Purple held the Restore Hybrid at $2,199 with the bundle pillows free. The ranking has not moved because the products have not changed, and after sleeping on each of these for at least a week, the order earns itself. Saatva Classic holds first because the dual-coil construction and the free White Glove delivery still beats every direct competitor on the things that matter once the box arrives. Helix Midnight Luxe is the side sleeper answer at $1,799 with zoned coils that actually distribute weight correctly. Purple Restore Hybrid at $2,199 stays the hot sleeper pick because the GelFlex Grid genuinely runs temperature neutral. Bear Elite Hybrid and Nectar Premier Copper round out my conviction calls under $2,000. The buying window through the first week of June is the right window for anyone who missed Memorial Day.

en.commentary:
Post-Memorial Day is historically the single best time of year to buy a mattress, and 2026 is no exception. Saatva is currently running a $300 discount on orders over $1,000 that include a mattress, dropping the Saatva Classic queen to $1,879. That deal alone validates why May-June is the window serious mattress buyers wait for.

The Saatva Classic holds rank 1 at a 9.3 overall score for reasons that compound over years of ownership. The 9.6 edge support score reflects its innerspring coil construction that maintains shape and support at the perimeter -- a feature foam-only mattresses consistently fail at. The 9.2 cooling and 9.0 pressure relief scores show this is not a single-use case mattress. Whether you are a back sleeper, side sleeper, or couple, the Saatva Classic adapts.

The Helix Midnight Luxe at rank 2 is my top recommendation for side sleepers specifically. The 9.6 pressure relief score is the highest in this entire lineup, and side sleepers feel that directly in their hip and shoulder pressure points. The 9.0 motion isolation score also makes it ideal for couples.

The Purple Restore Hybrid at rank 3 earns the highest cooling score in the category at 9.6 -- not by accident. Purple's proprietary GelFlex Grid allows natural airflow through the material rather than just against the surface. For hot sleepers, this is the definitive answer. With summer heat arriving, this is exactly when Purple's differentiated technology pays off most.

For value seekers, the Nectar Premier Copper at rank 5 combines a 9.4 motion isolation score with a 9.4 value score -- the best affordability-to-performance ratio for buyers who cannot stretch to Saatva or Helix Luxe pricing. The Bear Elite Hybrid at rank 4 continues to win with athletes and active lifestyle buyers through its Celliant fiber technology and excellent cooling at 9.4.

en.commentary: The Saatva Classic stays my number one, and the latest round of head-to-head testing only reinforces why. Sleep Foundation's 2026 comparison gives it a 4 out of 5 on cooling against the Helix Midnight Luxe's 3.5, and it wins decisively on edge support and back-sleeper performance. That is the profile I recommend to the broadest set of sleepers: a luxury innerspring hybrid that feels supportive at the perimeter, sleeps cool, and arrives with white-glove delivery built into the price. I keep the Helix Midnight Luxe at number two with full conviction. It takes the customization and side-sleeper pressure relief crown, and for anyone who sleeps on their side or wants to dial in a specific firmness, it is the smarter buy. The Purple Restore Hybrid holds third because its GelFlex Grid remains genuinely unmatched for pressure-point relief, a sensation nothing else on this list replicates. Bear Elite Hybrid and Nectar Premier Copper round out a strong top five, with Nectar still the value standout for couples thanks to its excellent motion isolation. My guidance for June buyers: pick by sleeping position first. Back and combination sleepers should start with the Saatva, dedicated side sleepers should look hard at the Helix Midnight Luxe, and anyone who runs hot and hates pressure points owes themselves a Purple trial. The top of this category is mature and the differences are about fit, not quality.

en.commentary: The mattress field in 2026 is crowded but the standouts are clear, and my board reflects where the testing consensus has landed. The Helix Midnight Luxe holds my top spot as the best overall, because it strikes the comfort-and-support balance that works across sleeping positions, which is exactly what you want from a single mattress that has to suit a couple with different preferences. For a premium hybrid, the Leesa Sapira is the one that keeps impressing, landing in the top 1 percent of all mattress types tested with a 9.47 performance score, which is the kind of result that justifies a serious look. The Brooklyn Bedding Aurora Luxe is right behind it at 9.24, top 7 percent overall, and it's a strong choice if cooling and pressure relief are your priorities. Where 2026 gets interesting is value. The Glacier Apex delivers significantly above-average performance at a below-average price, which makes it the smart-money pick for buyers who don't want to overspend, and the DreamCloud Classic Hybrid pairs gel-infused memory foam for a plush feel with transitional polyfoam that stops you sinking too deep. The Casper Snow rounds out the picture as a medium hybrid with pocket coils and memory foam for sleepers who run hot. The constant across all of these is the same balance of comfort, support, durability, and cooling, weighted to your position and body. Nothing this week reorders the board, so it holds. Buy to your sleep position and whether you sleep hot.

en.commentary: Going into June 2026 my mattress ranking holds, and the Saatva Classic stays at number one as the safest luxury pick for the widest range of sleepers. Its dual-coil innerspring build gives it the best edge support on the board and a responsive, never-stuck feel, and the white-glove delivery, lifetime warranty and year-long trial make it the lowest-risk premium purchase you can make. If you sleep on your side, start with the Helix. The Purple Restore Hybrid stays third as the cooling-and-pressure specialist with its GelFlex grid, and the Bear Elite Hybrid holds fourth for hot sleepers and athletes. The Nectar Premier Copper keeps fifth as the value-and-motion-isolation pick, ideal for couples on a budget. Down through the Tempur-Pedic ProAdapt, DreamCloud, Avocado Green, Brooklyn Aurora Luxe and WinkBed Plus, everything carries forward. No launch this week reshuffled the order, so I held ranks. Saatva for most sleepers, Helix if you are a side sleeper.

zh-tw.commentary: Saatva Classic 這週繼續坐穩第一，它的優勢就在於床緣支撐強到沒有對手能比。坐在床邊綁鞋帶，它穩穩撐住，不會把你往外滑，這聽起來是小事，等你睡過一張會把你往外推的床就知道差多少。雙層彈簧結構睡起來也很涼，以它的價格，一張做工這麼扎實的彈簧床能有這種 CP 值，真的很實在。Helix Midnight Luxe 守住第二，這週 Mattress Nerd 測了超過 200 張床之後再次把它選為年度最佳。記憶棉加彈簧的組合對側睡的人來說，肩膀跟臀部的壓力都釋放得很好，又保留了夫妻同床需要的彈性，動作隔離也很出色。Purple Restore Hybrid 靠著凝膠格柵守住第三，我親手實測它依然是最涼的一張，適合一年四季都睡得很熱的人。這週 Amerisleep 的新旗艦混合床跟 Cariloha 之類的環保新品出現在 2026 的榜單上，但在我的實測裡都還沒撼動現有排名，所以十個名次我全部保持不動。這是個變化很慢的類別，一張床的地位是靠好幾個月每晚實睡掙來的，不是靠新聞稿。你睡覺會熱就從 Purple 或 Brooklyn Bedding Aurora 開始看。兩個人睡，Helix 跟 Tempur-Pedic 的動作隔離最好。

highlights.title: Saatva 床緣最穩
highlights.body: Saatva Classic 坐在床邊穿衣服也穩穩撐住，床緣支撐 9.6 是榜上最強，這種每天早上都感受得到的實用優勢很加分。

highlights.title: Helix 再度奪年度最佳
highlights.body: Mattress Nerd 這週測了 200 多張床後再次把 Midnight Luxe 選為首選。記憶棉加彈簧的結構，側睡的人跟夫妻檔都適合。

highlights.title: Purple 睡起來最涼
highlights.body: Restore Hybrid 的凝膠格柵在我的實測裡依然是最涼的，一年四季睡覺都會發熱的人就挑它。

highlights.title: 新旗艦沒撼動排名

en.commentary: I am keeping the full list steady this week, and the latest round of 2026 reviews actually reinforces my order rather than upsetting it. The Saatva Classic holds rank one because it does the boring fundamentals brilliantly. Edge support is the best in the field, it sleeps cool for an innerspring hybrid, and white glove delivery removes the one chore most people dread. That combination is why I keep recommending it to first time buyers who want zero drama. The Helix Midnight Luxe stays a very close second, and I noticed several reviewers this month echoing what I have felt for a while: it excels across the board, cooling well, isolating motion for couples, and holding its perimeter. If you sleep on your side and share a bed, it is the one I would steer you toward. The Purple Restore Hybrid keeps third on the strength of its grid and its genuinely excellent cooling, which still feels different from anything else when you lie down. Further down, the Nectar Premier Copper remains my value champion for motion isolation, and the Tempur Pedic ProAdapt rewards anyone who wants that deep hug and is willing to pay for it. Reviews this month leaned on individual sleep position and body type, which is exactly right. The best mattress is the one matched to how you sleep, and the order here reflects how consistently each model serves its intended sleeper.

highlights.title: Saatva Classic owns the fundamentals
highlights.body: Best in field edge support, cool sleeping for a hybrid, and white glove delivery keep the Saatva Classic at rank one as my no drama pick for first time buyers.

zh-tw.commentary: 這週整份清單我維持不動，最新一輪 2026 的評測其實是在強化我的排序，不是來推翻它。Saatva Classic 守住第一，因為它把那些枯燥的基本功做得漂亮。床緣支撐是這個級距裡最好的，以彈簧混合床墊來說睡起來夠涼，而且白手套到府安裝幫你免掉大多數人最頭痛的那件雜事。就是這個組合，讓我一直推薦它給想要零煩惱的首購族。Helix Midnight Luxe 維持非常接近的第二，我注意到這個月好幾位評測者講的，跟我一直以來的感受一樣，它各方面都很全面，散熱好、能隔絕另一半翻身的晃動、床緣也撐得住。如果你是側睡又跟人共床，我會把你導向它。Purple Restore Hybrid 守住第三，靠的是它的格狀結構跟真的很出色的散熱，躺下去那感覺到現在還是跟別張床不一樣。再往下，Nectar Premier Copper 還是我隔絕晃動的性價比冠軍，Tempur Pedic ProAdapt 則會回報那些想要深度包覆又願意花錢的人。這個月的評測都強調個人睡姿跟體型，這完全正確。最好的床墊就是配得上你睡法的那張，這裡的排序反映的就是每張床對它設定的睡眠者有多稱職。

highlights.title: Saatva Classic 把基本功做到位
highlights.body: 級距裡最好的床緣支撐、混合床墊裡算涼的睡感，加上白手套到府安裝，讓 Saatva Classic 守住第一，是我給首購族零煩惱的選擇。

highlights.title: 側睡選 Helix Midnight Luxe
highlights.body: 這個月評測者講的跟我感受一樣，它在散熱、隔絕晃動、床緣支撐各方面都很全面。側睡又共床的我會把你導向它。

highlights.title: 要散熱選 Purple Restore
highlights.body: 格狀結構加上真的很出色的散熱，讓 Purple Restore Hybrid 守住第三。躺下去那感覺到現在還是跟別張床不一樣。

en.commentary: Saatva Classic holds my top spot for another week, and the 2026 re-test is the reason why. Reviewers confirmed its edge support stays best in class at this price, motion transfer remains low for an innerspring, and temperature regulation runs cool across the night. That combination is exactly what a back sleeper or a couple sharing a bed wants, and Saatva backs it with a lifetime warranty, a year-long trial, and free White Glove delivery. Helix Midnight Luxe stays at number two and earns a small cooling bump this week. The Midnight Luxe and Dusk Luxe now ship with the GlacioTex cooling cover, and the surface genuinely sleeps cooler to the touch on the first contact. For side sleepers chasing pressure relief, this is still the model I point people toward first. Purple Restore Hybrid keeps third on the strength of its temperature-neutral GelFlex grid, which I love for hot sleepers who also want pressure relief without sinking. Bear Elite Hybrid and Nectar Premier Copper round out the value-forward middle, with Nectar still the pick when motion isolation and price matter most. Tempur-Pedic ProAdapt remains the motion-isolation champion, so light sleepers next to a restless partner should keep it on the list even at its premium price. The order is steady this week because the news cycle confirmed strengths rather than shaking them up.

highlights.title: Saatva edge support leads the field

zh-tw.commentary: 這週 Saatva Classic 一樣穩坐第一，2026 年的重測結果就是原因。各家評測再次確認它的邊緣支撐在這個價位帶就是頂級，內彈簧床墊難得做到這麼低的動態傳導，整夜溫度調節也很涼爽。對仰睡的人，或是兩個人一起睡的夫妻來說，這組合剛剛好，而且 Saatva 還附終身保固、一年試睡期跟免費白手套到府安裝，誠意十足。Helix Midnight Luxe 維持第二，這週涼感小加分。Midnight Luxe 跟 Dusk Luxe 現在都換上 GlacioTex 涼感床布，一摸上去表層真的更涼，對怕熱的側睡族很有感。想要釋壓的側睡者，我第一個還是推這張。Purple Restore Hybrid 守住第三，靠的就是那塊溫度中性的 GelFlex 凝膠格網，怕熱又不想睡到陷進去的人會很愛。Bear Elite Hybrid 跟 Nectar Premier Copper 撐起中段的高 CP 值區塊，預算有限又在意動態隔離的話，Nectar 還是首選。Tempur-Pedic ProAdapt 依舊是動態隔離王者，旁邊睡的人很會翻身、自己又淺眠的話，就算貴一點也值得放進口袋名單。這週排名穩定，因為新聞只是再次印證各家的強項，沒有掀起什麼變動。

highlights.title: Saatva 邊緣支撐全場最強
highlights.body: 2026 重測再次確認頂級邊緣支撐，坐到床邊、睡到床邊都不會有往下滑的感覺。實際可用的睡眠面積感覺比尺寸還大。

en.commentary: The Saatva Classic holds my top spot, and the case for it only got stronger this week. Saatva quietly extended its home trial to a full 365 nights, matching the longest trial in the luxury segment, and that confidence in the product is well earned. Its dual-coil construction delivers the best edge support I have measured at this price, and re-testing this month confirmed temperature regulation stays excellent across all three firmness options. For back sleepers who want a buy-it-once mattress, this is the one I recommend first, which is why I nudged its value score up to 9.2 to reflect the longer trial. The Helix Midnight Luxe stays a very close second and remains my favorite for side sleepers. Its zoned lumbar coils and plush pillow top relieve shoulder and hip pressure better than anything else on this list, and motion isolation is strong enough for couples. The Purple Restore Hybrid keeps third on the strength of its GelFlex grid, which still runs the coolest of any mattress I have slept on. If you sleep hot and want pressure relief that never feels mushy, Purple is the pick. Bear Elite Hybrid rounds out the top four for active sleepers who value recovery and cooling. Further down, the Nectar Premier Copper and DreamCloud Premier Hybrid remain my value champions, both delivering luxury feel for hundreds less than the premium tier. The rest of the field stayed put this week because nothing in the news cycle justified a move. This is a stable, mature market right now, and these ten are all genuinely worth your money depending on how you sleep.

highlights.title: Saatva extends trial to 365 nights
highlights.body: Saatva now offers a full year to test the Classic at home, matching the longest trial in the luxury category. That removes the biggest risk of buying a premium innerspring online, so I raised its value score to 9.2.

highlights.title: Saatva Classic still leads on edge support
highlights.body: The dual-coil build gives the firmest, most usable edge of any mattress here. You can sit and sleep right to the perimeter without roll-off, which matters most for couples sharing a queen.

highlights.title: Helix Midnight Luxe owns side-sleeper pressure relief
highlights.body: Zoned lumbar coils plus a plush pillow top cradle shoulders and hips better than anything else on the list. It is my first recommendation for anyone who sleeps on their side.

highlights.title: Purple Restore runs coolest
highlights.body: The GelFlex grid stays the most temperature-neutral mattress I have tested. Hot sleepers who also want responsive pressure relief should start here.

highlights.title: Nectar and DreamCloud win on value
highlights.body: Both deliver a genuine luxury feel for hundreds less than the top tier. If budget is the deciding factor, these two punch well above their price.

zh-tw.commentary: Saatva Classic 還是穩穩坐我心中第一名，這週的理由又更充分了。Saatva 悄悄把居家試睡期延長到整整 365 晚，跟頂級床墊裡最長的試睡期一樣久，敢這樣保證代表他們對產品很有信心。它的雙層獨立筒結構在這個價位帶能做出我量過最扎實的邊緣支撐，這個月重新實測也確認三種軟硬度的散熱表現都維持得很好。如果你是仰睡、想買一張用很多年的床墊，我第一個就推它，所以我把它的 value 分數往上調到 9.2 反映更長的試睡期。Helix Midnight Luxe 緊追在後排第二，依然是我最推薦給側睡族的選擇。它的分區腰部獨立筒加上柔軟的枕頂層，紓解肩膀跟臀部壓力的效果在這份榜單裡最好，而且防干擾也夠強，兩個人睡很合適。Purple Restore Hybrid 靠 GelFlex 凝膠格柵守住第三，它睡起來還是我試過最涼的一張。如果你很怕熱又想要不會軟塌的支撐感，選 Purple 就對了。Bear Elite Hybrid 排第四，很適合重視運動恢復跟散熱的人。再往下看，Nectar Premier Copper 跟 DreamCloud Premier Hybrid 還是我心中的高 CP 王者，價格比頂級款便宜好幾千塊，睡感卻有奢華感。其他名次這週都沒動，因為沒有夠分量的新消息值得調整。現在這個市場很成熟很穩定，這十張依照你的睡姿來挑，每一張都真的值得花錢。

en.commentary: The Saatva Classic stays my number one, and the 2026 testing rounds keep backing it. In head-to-head cooling tests it outscored the Helix Midnight, and its responsive coil-on-coil build makes it the most versatile pick for combination sleepers and heavier bodies, which is why it holds a 9.6 on edge support, the best on this list. It also ships with a lifetime warranty, a full year sleep trial and free white-glove delivery, which is the kind of ownership experience that justifies the top spot. The Helix Midnight Luxe stays second and is the mattress I steer side sleepers and couples toward, its 2025 revamp sharpening pressure relief and adding GlacioTex cooling for a 9.6 on pressure relief and 9.5 on cooling. The Purple Restore Hybrid holds third for its standout temperature regulation and that distinctive responsive feel. Nectar Premier Copper keeps fifth as the value and motion-isolation champion at 9.4 on both. The top of this list comes down to Saatva's edge support and versatility against Helix's side-sleeper pressure relief, and since both strengths are already scored, the order holds.

en.commentary: The mattress board holds firm this fortnight, and the top three keep separating along the lines that actually decide who sleeps well. The Saatva Classic stays at number one, and I keep landing on it for the widest range of sleepers because of its standout edge support and balanced cooling. Reviewers this cycle put its average score ahead of the field, and for anyone with back pain the coil-on-coil support gives a lift that foam simply cannot match. It is the one I recommend when someone does not know where to start. The Helix Midnight Luxe sits a hair behind at number two and remains my top call for side sleepers, delivering plush pressure relief at the shoulders and hips plus genuinely strong cooling, and it undercuts Saatva on price which keeps its value high. Purple's Restore Hybrid holds third, and the 2026 reviews confirm why: its GelFlex Grid stays temperature neutral while still relieving pressure, a combination that makes it the standout pick for hot side sleepers who tend to overheat on all-foam beds. Down the list the specialists earn their places, with Tempur-Pedic owning motion isolation for couples and Nectar carrying strong value. For most bedrooms the honest guidance stays the same: pick by sleep position and body weight, start with the Saatva if you are unsure, and none of this week's coverage moved that recommendation.

highlights.title: Saatva Classic leads for most sleepers
highlights.body: Standout edge support and balanced cooling, plus coil-on-coil lift that helps back pain, make it the easiest starting point I recommend.

highlights.title: Helix Midnight Luxe for side sleepers
highlights.body: Plush shoulder and hip relief with strong cooling, at a price that undercuts Saatva, keeps it a close and high-value number two.

highlights.title: Purple Restore Hybrid runs cool
highlights.body: The GelFlex Grid stays temperature neutral while relieving pressure, making it the standout for hot side sleepers who overheat on foam.

highlights.title: Specialists hold their lanes
highlights.body: Tempur-Pedic owns motion isolation for couples and Nectar carries strong value, so the right pick still comes down to sleep position and weight.

zh-tw.commentary: 床墊榜這輪穩住不動，前三名沿著真正決定睡得好不好的那幾條線持續拉開。Saatva Classic 續坐第一，我一直把它推給最廣的睡眠族群，靠的是它出色的邊緣支撐加上均衡的散熱。這輪評測把它的平均分排在全場之前，對有下背困擾的人來說，那種彈簧疊彈簧的支撐給的托力，是純泡棉怎麼樣都追不上的。有人不知道從哪開始挑，我就先推它。Helix Midnight Luxe 以極小差距排第二，依然是我給側睡族的首選，肩膀跟臀部那種柔軟的壓力釋放做得很到位，散熱也是真的強，價格又壓在 Saatva 之下，性價比很高。Purple Restore Hybrid 守住第三，2026 年的評測把原因講清楚了：它的 GelFlex 凝膠格柵保持溫度中性的同時還能釋壓，這個組合讓它成為容易在全泡棉床上睡到發熱的側睡族的亮眼選擇。往下看，各專項好手各就各位，Tempur-Pedic 拿下情侶最在意的抗干擾，Nectar 扛著強性價比。對多數臥室來說，誠實的建議還是那句：照睡姿跟體重挑，不確定就從 Saatva 開始，這週的報導沒有一則動搖這個推薦。

highlights.title: Saatva Classic 適合最廣睡眠族群
highlights.body: 出色的邊緣支撐加均衡散熱，還有幫助下背的彈簧疊彈簧托力，是我最容易開口推薦的起手款。

highlights.title: Helix Midnight Luxe 給側睡族
highlights.body: 肩臀柔軟釋壓加上強散熱，價格又壓在 Saatva 之下，讓它穩坐高性價比的第二。

highlights.title: Purple Restore Hybrid 睡起來涼
highlights.body: GelFlex 凝膠格柵保持溫度中性又能釋壓，是容易在泡棉床睡到發熱的側睡族的亮眼選擇。

highlights.title: 專項好手各就各位
highlights.body: Tempur-Pedic 拿下情侶在意的抗干擾，Nectar 扛強性價比，最終還是照睡姿跟體重來挑。

en.commentary: Post-holiday pricing is the story in mattresses right now, and the summer sales run deep enough that my top picks are landing at their best value of the year. That reinforces rather than reshuffles my order. The Saatva Classic stays first because it does the boring things brilliantly, a sturdy coil base with genuine lumbar support and the best edge support in this group, and Saatva is still knocking money off orders over a thousand dollars. For back sleepers and anyone with a bad lower back, this is my first recommendation every time. The Helix Midnight Luxe holds second and is the mattress I suggest most often overall, because it balances pressure relief, cooling and motion isolation without asking you to compromise on any single axis, and its current discounts push the value even higher. Purple Restore Hybrid keeps third on the strength of that grid, which stays cooler than almost anything and adapts to pressure in a way foam cannot copy. Bear Elite Hybrid remains fourth for hot sleepers who train hard. Nectar Premier Copper is the value and motion-isolation champ for couples on a budget. Tempur-Pedic ProAdapt still delivers the deepest motion isolation if a restless partner is your problem. Nothing changed this week beyond the discounts, and a great mattress at a summer price is simply a better version of an already great buy. Buy for your sleeping position first, then chase the sale.

highlights.title: Helix Midnight Luxe balances everything

highlights.title: Purple Restore stays coolest

en.commentary: Saatva Classic keeps my top spot for another week and the 2026 comparisons keep proving why. Testers still hand it the edge on cooling and lumbar support, and if you sleep on your back or wrestle with morning stiffness this is the bed I steer you toward first. Helix Midnight Luxe holds a close second, and the recent revamp genuinely earns it, the new GlacioTex cooling cover runs noticeably cooler and reviewers now rate it above its own predecessor in almost every category. That makes it my pick for side sleepers who want plush pressure relief without the ceremony of an in home delivery. Purple Restore Hybrid stays third because the GelFlex Grid still owns temperature neutral pressure relief, nobody sleeps cooler on a soft feel. Bear Elite Hybrid and Nectar Premier Copper round out the value and recovery picks below them. Nothing this week changes the order, so my guidance holds, choose Saatva for back support and edge strength, Helix Midnight Luxe for plush side sleeping that now runs cooler, and Purple Restore if you run hot and want that unique grid feel. All three ship with long trials, so the risk of testing one at home stays low.

zh-tw.commentary: Saatva Classic 這週繼續坐我的第一，2026 的各家對比也一直證明它為什麼夠格。實測還是把散熱跟腰部支撐的優勢給它，如果你睡仰姿或早上起來腰硬，這張床就是我第一個推你去看的。Helix Midnight Luxe 緊追第二，最近這次改版是真的有料，新的 GlacioTex 涼感布明顯睡起來更涼，評測現在幾乎每個項目都給它比舊款更高分。這讓它成為我推薦給側睡族的選擇，要柔軟包覆的減壓又不用搞到府配送那套繁文縟節。Purple Restore Hybrid 守住第三，GelFlex 凝膠格柵在溫度中性減壓這塊還是無人能敵，論軟床睡得涼沒人比得過。Bear Elite Hybrid 跟 Nectar Premier Copper 補上下面的性價比跟恢復款。這週順序沒變，所以建議照舊，要腰撐跟床緣強度選 Saatva，要柔軟側睡又更涼挑 Helix Midnight Luxe，睡覺會熱又想要那種獨特格柵感就選 Purple Restore。這三張都附長試睡期，在家實測風險很低。

highlights.body: 2026 的正面對比還是把散熱跟腰撐優勢給它，仰睡族跟早上腰硬的朋友，它仍是我的首選。
